landing.headline: Fa nokware si adwuma, mmɔ nhyehyɛe.
landing.subheadline: Caliber yɛ talent-intelligence platform: nkitaho a eda adi, AI screening a ɛyɛ adaptive, ne candidate agent a ɔyɛ nokwarefo — ɔden ne onipa a ɔwɔ mu.
landing.feature1Body: Kyerɛ adwuma no Twi mu. Benya spec a etwa mu, rubric a ɛwɔ nkyerɛwee, ne nkitaho a wɔatete mu wɔ kwan so biara a emu nokware wɔ hɔ.
landing.feature2Body: Ɔno a ɔbisa abisade bɔ no mu no sua wo nimdeɛ biara na ɔma report card a ɛkyerɛ nokware — box tumm no nni hɔ, nnuhuma nso nni hɔ.
landing.feature3Body: Ɔyɛ adwuma bere a woada hɔ, fa kɔɔ bea a wo profile a wɔasesedee no si wo yiye — ɔmfa nnuhuma biara mma.

auth.passwordHint: Passwords ɛsɛ sɛ wɔn atwerɛ 12 anaa nea ɛboro saa.
